title: corymbia grandifolia subsp. longa
intro: Corymbia grandifolia subsp. longa, also known as Long-leaved Eucalyptus or Mountain Gum, is a subspecies of tree native to southeastern Australia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits associated with Corymbia grandifolia subsp. longa include relief from cold and flu symptoms, reduction of inflammation, and support for respiratory health. Corymbia grandifolia subsp. longa can be prepared into herbal teas, essential oils, and extracts for various health remedies.
